DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT SMOKE 152 POST, BUT DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT DANIEL MCINTOSH (WHO HAS PROVIDED ANSWERS). DEFENDANT SMOKE 152 POST'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT SMOKE 152 POST IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Daniel McIntosh, Defendant In Propria Persona
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is granted as to Defendant Smoke 152 Post, but denied as to Defendant Daniel McIntosh (who has provided answers). Defendant Smoke 152 Post's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Smoke 152 Post in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jul-08-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver IS DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Continued To Jul-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 612
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Representative from Smoke 252 Post St. appeared, did not state his appearance
No other appearances.

THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is continued to July 8, 2009 at 9:00am for further hearing on satisfaction of judgment. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
